name: @elizaos/os-usb-installer
description: Electrobun microapp scaffold for preparing bootable elizaOS USB installers.

scripts.lint: bunx @biomejs/biome check --write --unsafe src tests server.ts vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts
scripts.lint:check: bunx @biomejs/biome check src tests server.ts vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix: bunx @biomejs/biome check --write --unsafe src tests server.ts vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts
scripts.format: bunx @biomejs/biome format --write src tests server.ts vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts
scripts.format:check: bunx @biomejs/biome format src tests server.ts vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts
